targets.rawSql: SELECT timestamp AS "time", avg("HeartRate") AS "Heart Rate" FROM "HeartRateIntraday" WHERE timestamp BETWEEN cast(${__from}*1000 as timestamp) AND cast(${__to}*1000 as timestamp) SAMPLE BY 2m FILL(NULL)
SELECT now() AS "time", last("HeartRate") AS "HeartRate" FROM "HeartRateIntraday" WHERE timestamp BETWEEN cast(${__from}*1000 as timestamp) AND cast(${__to}*1000 as timestamp)

SELECT timestamp AS "time", mean_value FROM (SELECT timestamp, avg("HeartRate") AS mean_value FROM "HeartRateIntraday" WHERE timestamp BETWEEN cast(${__from}*1000 as timestamp) AND cast(${__to}*1000 as timestamp) SAMPLE BY 1m FILL(NULL)) WHERE mean_value <= 96

SELECT timestamp AS "time", mean_value FROM (SELECT timestamp, avg("HeartRate") AS mean_value FROM "HeartRateIntraday" WHERE timestamp BETWEEN cast(${__from}*1000 as timestamp) AND cast(${__to}*1000 as timestamp) SAMPLE BY 1m FILL(NULL)) WHERE mean_value > 96
